SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.flare

Class FlareFrustumRadiationCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.flare.FlareFrustumRadiationCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class FlareFrustumRadiationCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
Flare thermal-radiation calculator using the API 521 solid-flame (frustum) model.

Unlike a single point-source model, the solid-flame approach locates the radiant centroid of a wind-distorted flame and computes radiant flux at a ground-level receptor by inverse-square spreading with atmospheric transmissivity. The flame is tilted by the crosswind so that the centroid moves downwind, which is the physical mechanism behind a "relevant wind" radiation case.

The wind speed at the flame tip can be supplied directly or taken from RelevantWindCalculator.getRelevantWindSpeed(). The flame length is supplied from a flare datasheet or a separate flame-length correlation.

Computation steps:

  1. total heat release Q = mass flow · lower heating value;
  2. radiated power Qrad = F · Q;
  3. flame tilt from the wind/jet velocity ratio (sinθ = Rv / sqrt(1 + Rv^2));
  4. flame centroid located half the flame length along the tilted axis from the tip;
  5. radiant flux q = τ · Qrad / (4π · d^2) at the receptor.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • FlareFrustumRadiationCalculator

      public FlareFrustumRadiationCalculator()
      Default constructor for FlareFrustumRadiationCalculator.

  • Method Details

    • setDuty

      public void setDuty(double massFlowKgS, double lowerHeatingValueJKg, double fractionRadiatedDimensionless)
      Sets the flared-gas duty.
      Parameters:
      massFlowKgS - relieved mass flow rate in kg/s (must be > 0)
      lowerHeatingValueJKg - lower heating value in J/kg (must be > 0)
      fractionRadiatedDimensionless - radiated fraction F (0-1, must be > 0)

    • setFlameGeometry

      public void setFlameGeometry(double flameLengthM, double jetExitVelocityMS, double windSpeedMS, double flareTipElevationM)
      Sets the flame geometry and wind conditions.
      Parameters:
      flameLengthM - flame length in m (must be > 0)
      jetExitVelocityMS - gas jet exit velocity in m/s (must be > 0)
      windSpeedMS - wind speed at the flame tip in m/s (must be ≥ 0)
      flareTipElevationM - flare tip elevation above grade in m (must be > 0)

    • setReceptor

      public void setReceptor(double horizontalDistanceM, double receptorElevationM, double transmissivity, double allowableFluxWM2)
      Sets the receptor location and acceptance criteria.
      Parameters:
      horizontalDistanceM - downwind distance from the stack to the receptor in m (must be > 0)
      receptorElevationM - receptor elevation above grade in m (must be ≥ 0)
      transmissivity - atmospheric transmissivity (0-1, must be > 0)
      allowableFluxWM2 - allowable radiant heat flux in W/m2 (must be > 0)

    • fromFlare

      public void fromFlare(Flare flare)
      Populates the flare duty directly from a NeqSim process Flare.

      Reads the relieving mass flow from the flare inlet stream and the radiant scenario heat duty already computed by the flare, deriving the lower heating value as heat duty divided by mass flow. The radiated fraction and flame/receptor geometry are left unchanged so they can be configured separately via setDuty(double, double, double), setFlameGeometry(double, double, double, double) and setReceptor(double, double, double, double).

      Parameters:
      flare - the process flare supplying the relieving duty (must not be null and must have an inlet stream)

    • calcRadiation

      public void calcRadiation()
      Runs the API 521 solid-flame frustum radiation calculation.

    • getTotalHeatRelease

      public double getTotalHeatRelease()
      Returns the total heat release.

      total heat release in W

      Returns the flame centroid downwind horizontal coordinate.

      horizontal centroid coordinate in m

    • getCentroidElevation

      Returns the flame centroid elevation above grade.
      Returns:
      centroid elevation in m

    • getDistanceToReceptor

      public double getDistanceToReceptor()
      Returns the distance from the flame centroid to the receptor.
      Returns:
      distance in m

    • getRadiantHeatFlux

      public double getRadiantHeatFlux()
      Returns the radiant heat flux at the receptor.
      Returns:
      radiant heat flux in W/m2

    • isWithinAllowable

      public boolean isWithinAllowable()
      Returns whether the radiant flux is within the allowable limit.
      Returns:
      true when within the allowable radiant flux

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the calculation results to a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the results
